title: There (versão dvd)
html: Intro: E F#m E/G# A9 (2x) E F#m E/G# Well, I've heard a million times A9 In many songs and rhymes E F#m E/G# I've witnessed arguments about B how it will be E F#m E/G# Will it be every living eye A9 To see him coming in the sky F#m G#m A9 And what about the midnight cry, I E hear them say E F#m E/G# Are the streets like I was told A9 Are there really made of gold E F#m E/G# And will Jerusalem be built where it B is now E F#m E/G# How can there be a crystal sea A9 If the sea has ceased to be F#m G#m A9 All these questions annoy me, I just E9 don't care A9 B 'Cause I want to be there E/G# I just want to be there F#m G#m A9 And sit at my Jesus' feet B I wanna be there A B E I just don't care about the crown E/G# B A9 Or the color of the gown F#m G#m A9 As long as Jesus is in town I wanna E be there A9 B A9 I know there are things in this life B A9 that we can't understand B A9 There are moments we tend to F#m G#m A9 forget where we belong B A9 Sure, there's time, yes, there's B A9 wealth in that beautiful place B A E/G# A9 But all I want is to see him face to face
